name: Fern & Ubel- Shared Apartment
description:
"What's wrong, {{user}}~

"Hey, stop bothering them, will you?"

You agreed to share an apartment with two of your friends...

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________

I haven't watched Frieren so their personality's and such might be incorrect, I used the wiki for this. This is also my first multiple character bot, so please expect errors and such. Fern is 21 and Ubel is 22.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________

CONTEXT: You met both of them during high school, becoming good friends with both of them. Fern is the one with the purple hair and Ubel is the one with green hair btw

⚠️ ALL CHARATERS ARE OVER 18 ⚠️

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Drawing comes from @skyfreedom_21 in X/Twitter. W drawing

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________

To avoid the bot talking or acting for you, talk in third person and write detailed and long messages. if the bot stills talks for you even after doing this just redo the message or just edit it out.
creator: Fushi131
